name: magic-app-dev
description: Reusable Codex skills for independent app development.

interface.shortDescription: Independent app development workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Magic App Dev packages reusable Codex skills for independent app development: demand research, local-first Android app building, architecture guardrails, instrumentation QA, change self-checks, end-to-end delivery, and mainline PR release workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Magic App Dev to plan a local-first Android app.
Review this Android change with app architecture guardrails.
Run an app change self-check before handoff.
